pricing.plan_name: The right plan for your needs
pricing.raw_text: The right plan for your needs From independent trainers to big box gyms, we're here to help scale your business with powerful time-saving features and seamless automation. Bill Monthly Bill Annually save 16% Standard Plan Bundle BEST VALUE
Bill Monthly
Bill Monthly Bill Annually save 16%
Get free trial
The most powerful coaching app. Receive messages and important notifications on the go, or plan workouts and review client stats from your phone or tablet.
Billed Monthly
Basic Meal Plans
Design meal plans for each client that align with their macro goals and dietary preferences.
Create multi-week training plans to easily replicate your coaching regimen to more clients.
Basic Meal Plans
Plan ahead and schedule posts in your Community Forums.
Included in the Studio Plan
Meal Plans & Recipe Books
Develop customized meal plans for different group of clients
What happens if I want to upgrade/downgrade my plan?
Once subscribed, you can change your month-to-month plan anytime and as many times as you'd like. We'll prorate the difference between your current and new plans in your current bill cycle.
Yes, we’re here to help you build your brand! On the Pro or Studio plans, you can add your logo, change the workout background, and even choose a desired color scheme.
Pricing for Automation Money Saver Policy
You will be charged monthly only for your actual usage, counting the number of clients that have participated in at least one active Autoflow in the past month.
Price/month
